name: apply_worker_max_pending_num
description: Controls Raft/state-machine apply worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to applying committed updates and state-machine progress. Official default value(s): index=1024, store=1024. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 128 to 8193, step 128.
reason: TPC-H read-only workload during tuning; no writes to apply, so apply worker concurrency does not affect read query performance.

name: apply_worker_num
description: Controls Raft/state-machine apply worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to applying committed updates and state-machine progress. Official default value(s): index=64, store=96. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 1 to 32, step 1.
reason: TPC-H read-only workload during tuning; no writes to apply, so number of apply workers does not affect read query performance.

name: async_create_table
description: Controls asynchronous table creation. It is related to DDL and table creation behavior. Official default value(s): coordinator=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: choices: true, false.
reason: Asynchronous table creation is a DDL feature, and data loading is a separate preparation step, not part of the read-heavy tuning workload.

name: bdb_checkpoint_time_s
description: Controls checkpoint timing for the coordinator metadata backend. It is related to metadata persistence maintenance. Official default value(s): coordinator=1048576. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 524288 to 2097153, step 131072.
reason: Metadata backend checkpoint timing is a maintenance task unrelated to TPC-H query execution paths; does not affect read query performance.

name: bdb_dead_lock_detect_time_s
description: Controls deadlock detection timing for the coordinator metadata backend. It is related to metadata backend maintenance. Official default value(s): coordinator=1048576. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 524288 to 2097153, step 131072.
reason: Metadata backend deadlock detection timing is a maintenance task unrelated to TPC-H query execution; does not affect read query performance.

name: bdb_stat_time_s
description: Controls statistics timing for the coordinator metadata backend. It is related to metadata backend statistics collection. Official default value(s): coordinator=1048576. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 131072 to 10485761, step 131072.
reason: Metadata backend statistics collection timing is a maintenance task; TPC-H statistics are gathered once before the run and do not affect on-the-fly read query performance.

name: braft_use_align_hearbeat
description: Controls aligned heartbeat behavior in the Raft implementation. It is related to Raft heartbeat scheduling. Official default value(s): coordinator=False, index=False, store=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: choices: true, false.
reason: May reduce background network/CPU overhead from Raft heartbeats, potentially freeing resources for query execution.

name: default_replica_num
description: Controls the default replica count for newly created data objects. It is related to object creation and replication policy. Official default value(s): coordinator=$DEFAULT_REPLICA_NUM$. Value type: string. Candidate tuning domain: 1 to 7, step 1.
reason: Default replica count only affects creation of new data objects; all tables already exist after the separate data loading step.

name: dingo_log_switch_coor_kv
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: choices: true, false.
reason: Logging can add I/O and CPU overhead; switching it on/off may impact query execution time.

name: dingo_log_switch_coor_lease
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: choices: true, false.
reason: Logging can add I/O and CPU overhead; switching it on/off may impact query execution time.

name: dingo_log_switch_coor_watch
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: choices: true, false.
reason: Logging overhead could impact query performance; unclear if disabling improves execution time.

name: dingo_log_switch_scalar_speed_up_detail
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: choices: true, false.
reason: Logging overhead could impact query performance; unclear if disabling improves execution time.

name: dingo_log_switch_txn_detail
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): index=False, store=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: choices: true, false.
reason: Workload is read-only TPC-H with no transactions; transaction detail logging is irrelevant.

name: dingo_trace_append_entry_latency
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: choices: true, false.
reason: Append entry latency tracing relates to write replication; workload is read-only.

name: enable_dir_service
description: Controls whether the directory service is enabled. It is related to auxiliary service exposure and operational introspection. Official default value(s): coordinator=False, index=False, store=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: choices: true, false.
reason: Directory service does not affect analytical query execution.

name: enable_threads_service
description: Controls whether the threads service is enabled. It is related to exposing or managing thread information for operational introspection. Official default value(s): coordinator=False, index=False, store=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: choices: true, false.
reason: Threads service does not affect analytical query execution.

name: free_memory_to_system_interval
description: Controls the interval for returning free memory back to the operating system. It is related to memory reclamation behavior and memory usage stability. Official default value(s): coordinator=60, index=60, store=60. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 0 to 91, step 5.
reason: Memory reclamation interval can impact memory pressure and scan performance in analytical queries.

name: hnsw_max_init_max_elements
description: Controls the initial maximum element capacity for HNSW index initialization. It is related to HNSW index construction and memory planning. Official default value(s): index=40000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 20000 to 80001, step 10000.
reason: HNSW index is for vector data; TPC-H is relational with no vector operations.

name: max_hnsw_memory_size_of_region
description: Controls the memory limit for HNSW data within a region. It is related to vector index memory usage. Official default value(s): coordinator=2147483648, index=2147483648. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 1073741824 to 4294967297, step 268435456.
reason: HNSW memory limit is for vector index; TPC-H does not use vector data.

name: omp_num_threads
description: Controls OpenMP thread count for parallel computation. It is related to CPU parallelism in operations that use OpenMP. Official default value(s): index=1. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 1 to 11, step 1.
reason: OpenMP thread count directly affects parallelism in analytical query operations.

name: service_log_threshold_time_ns
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=100000000, index=10000000000, store=1000000000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 50000000 to 200000001, step 10000000.
reason: Logging verbosity may affect CPU and I/O overhead, potential performance impact unclear.

name: vector_max_batch_count
description: Controls the maximum batch size used by vector operations. It is related to vector query batching and execution efficiency. Official default value(s): index=4096. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 128 to 16385, step 128.
reason: TPC-H workload does not use vector operations; this parameter is irrelevant.

name: vector_operation_parallel_thread_num
description: Controls the number of parallel threads used by vector operations. It is related to vector computation concurrency. Official default value(s): index=16. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 4 to 65, step 4.
reason: TPC-H workload does not use vector operations; this parameter is irrelevant.

name: approximate_size_metrics_collect_interval_s
description: Controls metrics or size-statistics collection interval. It is related to background monitoring and statistics collection. Official default value(s): index=300, store=300. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 100 to 2001, step 100.
reason: Background metrics collection may compete for resources, potential impact on query performance unclear.

name: heartbeat_interval_s
description: Controls heartbeat reporting interval between service components. It is related to cluster liveness reporting and state refresh frequency. Official default value(s): index=6, store=6. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 2 to 25, step 2.
reason: Heartbeat interval affects cluster liveness reporting, not query execution performance under stable workload.

name: metrics_collect_interval_s
description: Controls metrics or size-statistics collection interval. It is related to background monitoring and statistics collection. Official default value(s): index=300, store=300. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 100 to 2001, step 100.
reason: Background metrics collection may compete for resources, potential impact on query performance unclear.

name: scrub_vector_index_interval_s
description: Controls the interval for scrubbing or checking vector index state. It is related to background vector index maintenance. Official default value(s): index=60. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 30 to 121, step 30.
reason: TPC-H workload does not use vector indexes; this parameter is irrelevant.

name: background_thread_num
description: Controls the number of storage background threads. It is related to background storage maintenance and compaction capacity. Official default value(s): coordinator=16, index=16, store=16. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 1 to 16, step 1.
reason: Background thread count affects compaction and I/O contention, directly impacting read-heavy workload performance.

name: block_cache_size
description: Controls storage block cache capacity. It is related to cache hit rate, memory usage, and read latency. Official default value(s): coordinator=2147483648, index=2147483648, store=2147483648. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 1048576 to 4294967296, step 1048576.
reason: Block cache size directly influences read cache hit rates, critical for analytical scan and join performance.

name: stats_dump_period_s
description: Controls periodic storage statistics dump interval. It is related to background statistics reporting. Official default value(s): coordinator=120, index=120, store=120. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: 50 to 1201, step 50.
reason: Statistics dump period controls diagnostic output; not expected to affect workload execution time.

name: coordinator_service_worker_max_pending_num
description: Controls coordinator service worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to coordinator request handling and metadata service capacity. Official default value(s): coordinator=1024. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Coordinator concurrency may affect query planning and metadata operations, impacting TPC-H execution time.

name: coordinator_service_worker_num
description: Controls coordinator service worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to coordinator request handling and metadata service capacity. Official default value(s): coordinator=32. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Number of coordinator workers can influence coordinator throughput and thus overall query performance.

name: dingo_log_switch_diskann_detail
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): index=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: DiskANN vector index is not used in TPC-H relational workload; logging flag has no impact.

name: dingo_log_switch_txn_gc_detail
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): index=False, store=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Transaction GC detail logging is irrelevant because TPC-H is read-heavy with no active transactions during performance runs.

name: enable_async_store_operation
description: Controls whether store operations can run asynchronously. It is related to store-side operation scheduling. Official default value(s): store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Asynchronous store operations can improve I/O scheduling and query latency for analytical scans.

name: enable_coprocessor_v2_statistics_time_consumption
description: Controls time-consumption statistics collection for coprocessor execution. It is related to query execution instrumentation. Official default value(s): index=False, store=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Statistics collection may add overhead; disabling it could affect query execution time.

name: enable_rocksdb_perf_metric
description: Controls RocksDB performance metric collection. It is related to performance instrumentation and metrics overhead. Official default value(s): store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Performance metric collection overhead may impact storage layer performance; tuning can reduce latency.

name: enable_vector_index_diskann
description: Controls whether DiskANN vector index support is enabled. It is related to vector index availability and vector search behavior. Official default value(s): index=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: DiskANN vector index is not used; enabling it does not affect TPC-H query performance.

name: max_restore_count
description: Controls restore operation limits or restore memory usage. It is related to backup/restore workflows. Official default value(s): coordinator=32768, index=32768, store=32768. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Restore operations are not part of TPC-H query execution; parameter only affects restore behavior.

name: max_restore_data_memory_size
description: Controls restore operation limits or restore memory usage. It is related to backup/restore workflows. Official default value(s): coordinator=10485760, index=10485760, store=10485760. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Restore memory size is not relevant to TPC-H query execution.

name: meta_service_worker_max_pending_num
description: Controls metadata service worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to metadata request processing. Official default value(s): coordinator=1024. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Metadata service concurrency may affect query planning and execution in analytical workloads with multiple tables.

name: meta_service_worker_num
description: Controls metadata service worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to metadata request processing. Official default value(s): coordinator=32. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Metadata worker count can influence the handling of schema and statistics requests during complex query processing.

name: print_periodic_merge_check
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=False, index=False, store=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Only controls diagnostic logging; not related to core query execution paths for read-heavy analytical workloads.

name: print_periodic_split_check
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=False, index=False, store=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Purely an observability flag with no impact on query performance or resource management.

name: print_process_job_error
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Logs job errors; does not affect read-path execution or performance of analytical queries.

name: print_raft_add_node
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Diagnostic logging related to Raft membership changes, irrelevant to TPC-H read queries.

name: print_recycle_orphan_region_not_table_or_index
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=False, index=False, store=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Logging for region recycling; no direct connection to analytical query throughput or latency.

name: raft_latency_log_append_entries
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Measures Raft append latency for debugging; no influence on query execution performance.

name: raft_latency_log_batch_append_entries
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Observability tool for batch Raft append latency, not a tuning lever for read-heavy workloads.

name: raft_latency_log_handle_append_entries
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Logging Raft handle append latency; unrelated to analytical query processing or optimization.

name: raft_latency_log_init
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Logging initialization parameter unrelated to read query execution; no impact on TPC-H analytical performance.

name: raft_latency_log_threshold_ms
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=1000, index=1000, store=1000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Logging threshold parameter only affects diagnostic output frequency; irrelevant to read-heavy query workload.

name: raft_meta_enable_leveldb_tuning
description: Controls LevelDB tuning for Raft metadata storage. It is related to Raft metadata persistence performance. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: LevelDB tuning for Raft metadata may affect disk or CPU resources, potentially influencing overall system performance during queries.

name: raft_meta_enable_preserialize
description: Controls pre-serialization behavior for Raft metadata. It is related to Raft metadata processing efficiency. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Pre-serialization behavior could impact CPU usage for metadata operations, not clearly irrelevant to read path.

name: raft_meta_force_no_sync
description: Controls sync behavior for Raft metadata persistence. It is related to durability and write-side metadata overhead. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Raft metadata sync control affects write durability; minimal effect on read-dominated TPC-H workload.

name: raft_meta_periodic_sync_enabled
description: Controls whether Raft metadata is periodically synchronized. It is related to Raft metadata durability maintenance. Official default value(s): coordinator=False, index=False, store=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Periodic sync of Raft metadata is write-side maintenance with negligible impact on analytical read queries.

name: raft_meta_periodic_sync_interval_ms
description: Controls the interval for periodic Raft metadata synchronization. It is related to Raft metadata durability maintenance. Official default value(s): coordinator=1000, index=1000, store=1000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Sync interval only matters if syncs are enabled; indirect and minimal relevance to read-heavy workload.

name: raft_sync
description: Controls synchronous Raft log behavior. It is related to Raft write durability and replication overhead. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Raft log sync setting governs write replication; no impact on read-only analytical query execution.

name: read_worker_max_pending_num
description: Controls read-side worker concurrency or read request queueing. It is related to scheduling and processing read requests. Official default value(s): index=1024, store=1024. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Directly controls read request queue depth, highly relevant for concurrency and throughput of analytical scans/joins.

name: read_worker_num
description: Controls read-side worker concurrency or read request queueing. It is related to scheduling and processing read requests. Official default value(s): index=128, store=128. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Read worker thread count is a primary tunable for read-heavy TPC-H workload, affecting query parallelism and latency.

name: rocks_log_enable_get_term_cache
description: Controls a Rocks/Raft log cache behavior for term lookup. It is related to Raft log metadata access. Official default value(s): coordinator=True, index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Raft log term cache is not directly related to read-heavy analytical query execution performance.

name: store_state_machine_enable_independent_queue
description: Controls whether the store state machine uses an independent queue. It is related to state-machine task scheduling and queue isolation. Official default value(s): coordinator=False, index=False, store=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Store state machine queue isolation may impact read request scheduling and latency for analytical queries.

name: version_service_worker_max_pending_num
description: Controls version service worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to version/timestamp service request processing. Official default value(s): coordinator=1024. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Version service handles snapshot timestamps; pending queue size can affect read latency under concurrency.

name: version_service_worker_num
description: Controls version service worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to version/timestamp service request processing. Official default value(s): coordinator=32. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Version service worker count directly influences timestamp request throughput, impacting query execution.

name: write_worker_max_pending_num
description: Controls write-side worker concurrency or write request queueing. It is related to write request processing rather than read execution. Official default value(s): index=1024, store=1024. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Write worker queue is for write processing, not relevant for read-only TPC-H workload.

name: write_worker_num
description: Controls write-side worker concurrency or write request queueing. It is related to write request processing rather than read execution. Official default value(s): index=128, store=128. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Write worker count is for write processing, not relevant for read-only TPC-H workload.

name: auto_compaction
description: Controls metadata compaction behavior. It is related to coordinator metadata storage maintenance. Official default value(s): coordinator=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Metadata compaction may affect metadata read latency during query planning and execution.

name: balance_leader_inspection_time_period
description: Controls the time window for leader balance inspection. It is related to coordinator balancing policy. Official default value(s): coordinator=0,23. Value type: string. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Leader balancing impacts read load distribution; time window can affect how quickly skew is corrected.

name: balance_region_default_region_count_ratio
description: Controls a ratio used by region balancing policy. It is related to region distribution decisions. Official default value(s): coordinator=0.8. Value type: float. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Region count ratio influences data distribution, which can affect parallel query execution performance.

name: balance_region_inspection_time_period
description: Controls the time window for region balance inspection. It is related to coordinator balancing policy. Official default value(s): coordinator=0,23. Value type: string. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Region balance inspection time window affects how quickly data skew is addressed, impacting query load balance.

name: calc_metrics_interval_s
description: Controls metrics or size-statistics collection interval. It is related to background monitoring and statistics collection. Official default value(s): coordinator=60. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Metrics collection interval is a background monitoring task that does not affect TPC-H query execution time.

name: compaction_interval_s
description: Controls metadata compaction behavior. It is related to coordinator metadata storage maintenance. Official default value(s): coordinator=300. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Coordinator metadata compaction is unrelated to analytical query performance on a read-only workload.

name: compaction_retention_rev_count
description: Controls metadata compaction behavior. It is related to coordinator metadata storage maintenance. Official default value(s): coordinator=1000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Controls metadata compaction retention; no impact on TPC-H read-heavy query execution.

name: job_interval_s
description: Controls coordinator background job scheduling interval. It is related to metadata and management task scheduling. Official default value(s): coordinator=1. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Background job scheduling interval does not influence analytical query processing.

name: lease_interval_s
description: Controls coordinator lease renewal/check interval. It is related to metadata lease management and cluster coordination. Official default value(s): coordinator=1. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Lease renewal interval affects coordinator coordination, irrelevant to query throughput.

name: meta_watch_clean_interval_s
description: Controls metadata watch cleanup/removal interval. It is related to watch lifecycle maintenance. Official default value(s): coordinator=60. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Cleanup of metadata watches is a background maintenance task with no effect on query latencies.

name: push_interval_s
description: Controls coordinator push interval for metadata or state propagation. It is related to metadata update distribution. Official default value(s): coordinator=1. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Metadata push interval is unrelated to TPC-H read performance.

name: recycle_job_interval_s
description: Controls coordinator background job scheduling interval. It is related to metadata and management task scheduling. Official default value(s): coordinator=600. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Background job recycling interval does not impact analytical query execution.

name: recycle_orphan_interval_s
description: Controls coordinator job or orphan metadata recycling policy. It is related to background metadata cleanup. Official default value(s): coordinator=60. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Orphan metadata cleanup interval is irrelevant for read-only workload performance.

name: remove_watch_interval_s
description: Controls metadata watch cleanup/removal interval. It is related to watch lifecycle maintenance. Official default value(s): coordinator=10. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Watch removal interval is a background maintenance parameter with no direct impact on TPC-H queries.

name: reserve_job_recent_day
description: Controls coordinator job or orphan metadata recycling policy. It is related to background metadata cleanup. Official default value(s): coordinator=7. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Background job metadata recycling irrelevant to read-only TPC-H query performance.

name: update_state_interval_s
description: Controls coordinator state update interval. It is related to periodic cluster state maintenance. Official default value(s): coordinator=10. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Periodic state updates could affect coordinator overhead and scheduling; unclear if it impacts query execution time.

name: diskann_server_build_worker_max_pending_num
description: Controls DiskANN index build worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to vector index building rather than steady-state search. Official default value(s): index=256. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: DiskANN parameters are for vector index building, not used by TPC-H analytical queries.

name: diskann_server_build_worker_num
description: Controls DiskANN index build worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to vector index building rather than steady-state search. Official default value(s): index=64. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: DiskANN parameters are for vector index building, not used by TPC-H analytical queries.

name: diskann_server_load_worker_max_pending_num
description: Controls DiskANN index load worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to loading vector indexes into service. Official default value(s): index=1024. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: DiskANN parameters are for loading vector indexes, not used by TPC-H analytical queries.

name: diskann_server_load_worker_num
description: Controls DiskANN index load worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to loading vector indexes into service. Official default value(s): index=128. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: DiskANN parameters are for loading vector indexes, not used by TPC-H analytical queries.

name: enable_follower_hold_index
description: Controls whether followers hold index data. It is related to index availability and follower-side index behavior. Official default value(s): index=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Document index holder behavior irrelevant to TPC-H relational queries.

name: do_gc_interval_s
description: Controls garbage collection interval. It is related to background cleanup and obsolete data reclamation. Official default value(s): index=60, store=60. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Garbage collection interval irrelevant to read-only workload with no data modifications.

name: update_safe_point_interval_s
description: Controls safe point update interval. It is related to MVCC/GC progress and background cleanup coordination. Official default value(s): index=60, store=60. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: MVCC safe point update irrelevant to read-only workload with no active transactions.

name: level
description: Controls logging, tracing, diagnostic output, or log verbosity thresholds. It is related to observability rather than core execution logic. Official default value(s): coordinator=INFO, index=INFO, store=INFO. Value type: string. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Log verbosity is an observability setting with negligible impact on TPC-H query execution time.

name: election_timeout_s
description: Controls Raft election timeout. It is related to leader election stability and failure recovery timing. Official default value(s): coordinator=30, index=20, store=15. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: TPC-H is read-only; leader election stability does not affect query execution time.

name: leader_num_weight
description: Controls leader balancing weight. It is related to leader distribution and cluster balancing. Official default value(s): index=1, store=1. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: May affect read request distribution if reads are served by leaders; unclear.

name: segmentlog_max_segment_size
description: Controls maximum segment size for Raft logs. It is related to Raft log storage management. Official default value(s): coordinator=33554432, index=33554432, store=33554432. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Only affects Raft log storage during writes; no writes during TPC-H query execution.

name: snapshot_interval_s
description: Controls Raft snapshot interval. It is related to snapshot generation and state-machine maintenance. Official default value(s): coordinator=300, index=120, store=120. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Snapshots are triggered by write activity; irrelevant for read-only workload.

name: enable_auto_merge
description: Controls automatic region merge behavior. It is related to region layout and background region maintenance. Official default value(s): index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Region layout affects scan performance, potentially impacting query time.

name: enable_auto_split
description: Controls automatic region split behavior. It is related to region layout changes when data grows or regions become large. Official default value(s): index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Region splitting influences data distribution and scan parallelism.

name: max_merge_region_keys
description: Controls the maximum key count threshold used by region merge policy. It is related to region merge decisions. Official default value(s): store=10000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Region merge thresholds impact region count and thus query scans.

name: max_merge_region_size
description: Controls the maximum size threshold used by region merge policy. It is related to region merge decisions. Official default value(s): store=1048576. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Affects region merge decisions, influencing data locality and scan efficiency.

name: merge_check_concurrency
description: Controls concurrency of region merge checks. It is related to background region maintenance parallelism. Official default value(s): index=3, store=3. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Background merge checks may consume resources and interfere with query processing.

name: merge_check_interval_s
description: Controls interval for region merge checks. It is related to background region maintenance frequency. Official default value(s): index=120, store=120. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Frequency of merge checks can affect how quickly region layout adapts, impacting long-running queries.

name: merge_keys_ratio
description: Controls key-count ratio threshold for region merging. It is related to region merge decisions. Official default value(s): index=0.2, store=0.2. Value type: float. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Controls region merging thresholds that can affect data layout and scan performance in read-heavy workload.

name: merge_size_ratio
description: Controls size ratio threshold for region merging. It is related to region merge decisions. Official default value(s): index=0.2, store=0.2. Value type: float. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Similar to merge_keys_ratio, may influence region merging behavior and subsequently read latency and throughput.

name: region_max_size
description: Controls maximum region size threshold. It is related to region split and layout policy. Official default value(s): index=536870912, store=268435456. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Determines maximum region size, affecting region count and parallelism during scans; potentially relevant to analytical query performance.

name: region_merge_min_keys_count
description: Controls minimum key count threshold for region merging. It is related to region merge eligibility. Official default value(s): index=10000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Sets minimum key count for merging; can impact region fragmentation and read efficiency.

name: region_merge_min_size
description: Controls minimum size threshold for region merging. It is related to region merge eligibility. Official default value(s): index=1048576. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Sets minimum size for merging; may influence how regions are compacted, affecting read paths.

name: split_check_interval_s
description: Controls interval for region split checks. It is related to background region split maintenance. Official default value(s): index=120, store=120. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Interval for split checks is irrelevant because no data modifications occur during the read-only TPC-H workload, so splits are not triggered.

name: split_merge_interval
description: Controls time interval between split and merge operations. It is related to region layout maintenance. Official default value(s): store=3600. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Controls split/merge timing; useless in static read-only workload where no region splits or merges happen after initial loading.

name: split_strategy
description: Controls region split strategy. It is related to how new or growing regions are split. Official default value(s): index=POST_CREATE_REGION, store=POST_CREATE_REGION. Value type: string. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Determines how splits are performed; irrelevant as no splits occur during the benchmark execution.

name: get_tso_interval_ms
description: Controls timestamp oracle fetch/update interval. It is related to timestamp service interaction. Official default value(s): index=1000, store=1000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Timestamp oracle fetch interval can affect read transaction timestamp freshness and performance; its impact on query latency is unclear, so keep.

name: store_metrics_collect_interval_s
description: Controls metrics or size-statistics collection interval. It is related to background monitoring and statistics collection. Official default value(s): index=30, store=30. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Metrics collection interval only affects background monitoring frequency; no significant impact on read query performance.

name: worker_thread_ratio
description: Controls the ratio used to derive service worker thread count from CPU resources. It is related to overall request handling concurrency. Official default value(s): coordinator=4, index=4, store=4. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Controls request handling concurrency; may affect query throughput and latency for analytical workload.

name: fast_background_thread_num
description: Controls the number of storage background threads. It is related to background storage maintenance and compaction capacity. Official default value(s): index=8. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Background storage threads can impact I/O and CPU contention, potentially affecting read-heavy scan performance.

name: max_bytes_rpc
description: Controls the maximum bytes returned or processed per scan RPC. It is related to scan batching, latency, and throughput. Official default value(s): store=4194304. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Directly controls scan batch size, influencing scan throughput and latency for large analytical queries.

name: max_fetch_cnt_by_server
description: Controls the maximum number of records fetched by the server during scan operations. It is related to scan batching and result delivery. Official default value(s): store=1000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Limits records per scan batch; affects data retrieval efficiency during multi-table scans and joins.

name: scan_interval_s
description: Controls the interval associated with scan task handling. It is related to scan lifecycle and background scan management. Official default value(s): store=30. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Unclear interaction with scan scheduling; conservative keep as it may influence scan resource management.

name: timeout_s
description: Controls timeout for scan operations. It is related to long-running scan behavior and request failure timing. Official default value(s): store=300. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Scan timeout can prematurely abort long-running analytical queries if set too low; relevant for workload completion.

name: max_bytes_rpc
description: Controls the maximum bytes returned or processed per scan RPC. It is related to scan batching, latency, and throughput. Official default value(s): store=4194304. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Similar to store.scan.max_bytes_rpc; controls scan v2 batch size affecting analytical scan performance.

name: max_fetch_cnt_by_server
description: Controls the maximum number of records fetched by the server during scan operations. It is related to scan batching and result delivery. Official default value(s): store=1000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Limits scan v2 record count per batch; directly relevant to data fetch efficiency in analytical queries.

name: scan_interval_s
description: Controls the interval associated with scan task handling. It is related to scan lifecycle and background scan management. Official default value(s): store=30. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Unclear impact on scan lifecycle; conservative keep as it may influence background scan management.

name: timeout_s
description: Controls timeout for scan operations. It is related to long-running scan behavior and request failure timing. Official default value(s): store=300. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: Scan v2 timeout affects long-running query resilience; tuning needed to avoid unnecessary failures.

name: enable_follower_hold_index
description: Controls whether followers hold index data. It is related to index availability and follower-side index behavior. Official default value(s): index=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain: not specified.
reason: May affect read performance if followers serve queries, relevant for read-heavy TPC-H.
